_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: The 79.1% match to the August 2024 accumulation bottom, combined with expanding stablecoin reserves and institutional ETF flows, supports a ladder climb from Complacency into Hope as the path of least resistance.
next_move.brains_agree: Yes — both brains agree on UP direction and accumulation thesis; they disagree on current phase placement but converge on forward trajectory
